name: Chicken Spaghetti
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the chicken in a pot of water until cooked through.
2. Remove the chicken from the water and let it cool before peeling off the skin and bones.
3. Cook the spaghetti according to package instructions, then drain.
4. In a large casserole dish, combine the cooked spaghetti with the remaining cream of mushroom soup, cream of chicken soup, garlic, salt, and pepper.
5. Mix in half of the grated cheddar cheese.
6. Sprinkle the remaining cheese on top of the dish.
7. Bake at 350°F (175°C) until heated through and the cheese is melted.
